---
title: "directRNA — Analysis Summary"
subtitle: "Oxford Nanopore Direct RNA-seq"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
params:
  versions: "software_versions.yml"
  run_summary: "run_summary.yml"
  inputs_dir: "inputs"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
import os, glob, yaml
inputs = params["inputs_dir"] if isinstance(params, dict) else "inputs"

def read_yaml(path):
    try:
        with open(path) as fh:
            return yaml.safe_load(fh) or {}
    except Exception:
        return {}

def find(patterns):
    hits = []
    for p in patterns:
        hits += glob.glob(os.path.join(inputs, "**", p), recursive=True)
        hits += glob.glob(p)
    return sorted(set(hits))

run = read_yaml(params.get("run_summary", "run_summary.yml") if isinstance(params, dict) else "run_summary.yml")
vers = read_yaml(params.get("versions", "software_versions.yml") if isinstance(params, dict) else "software_versions.yml")
```

## Run overview

This report summarises a directRNA analysis run. Per-tool interactive metrics
are in the accompanying **MultiQC** report; this document is the cross-module
narrative summary (spec §8).

```{python}
#| label: overview
#| output: asis
if run:
    for k, v in run.items():
        print(f"- **{k}**: {v}")
else:
    print("_Run summary not available._")
```

## Quality control (§5.3)

NanoPlot / ToulligQC / pycoQC outputs:

```{python}
#| output: asis
qc = find(["*NanoStats.txt", "*_report.data", "*.json"])
print(f"{len(qc)} QC artifact(s) detected." if qc else "_No QC artifacts staged._")
```

## Alignment & quantification (§5.4)

```{python}
#| output: asis
aln = find(["*.flagstat"]); quant = find(["quant.sf"])
print(f"- Alignment flagstats: {len(aln)}")
print(f"- Salmon quant tables: {len(quant)}")
```

## RNA modifications (§5.5)

```{python}
#| output: asis
m6a = find(["data.site_proba.csv.gz"]); nc = find(["*nanocompore_results.tsv"])
el  = find(["*pair_diff_mod.txt"]); nr = find(["*stoichiometry.tsv"])
print(f"- m6anet site tables: {len(m6a)}")
print(f"- Nanocompore results: {len(nc)}")
print(f"- ELIGOS results: {len(el)}")
print(f"- nanoRMS results: {len(nr)}")
```

## Poly(A)/poly(U) tails (§5.6)

```{python}
#| output: asis
pa = find(["*.polya.tsv.gz"]); tf = find(["*.tails.csv"])
print(f"- nanopolish polya tables: {len(pa)}")
print(f"- tailfindr tables: {len(tf)}")
```

## De novo transcripts (§5.7)

```{python}
#| output: asis
ra = find(["*rattle_transcripts.fa"]); st = find(["*.stringtie.gtf"])
print(f"- RATTLE assemblies: {len(ra)}")
print(f"- StringTie2 GTFs: {len(st)}")
```

## Software versions (§11)

```{python}
#| output: asis
if vers:
    for proc, tools in vers.items():
        print(f"- **{proc}**")
        if isinstance(tools, dict):
            for t, v in tools.items():
                print(f"    - {t}: {v}")
else:
    print("_Versions not available._")
```

---

_Generated by the directRNA pipeline._
